input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.14.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.14.1.1
            TITLE: after endurance and refuelling are completed, all vehicles must report to technical inspection.

            CONTENT:
            rule D.14.1.1: After Endurance and refuelling are completed, all vehicles must report to Technical Inspection.
D.14.1.1 After Endurance and refuelling are completed, all vehicles must report to Technical Inspection.

final_answer: After Endurance and refuelling are completed, all vehicles must report to Technical Inspection.
